summary: Result-driven Senior Software Engineer with over 8 years of professional experience designing, building, and deploying highly scalable cloud-native architectures and applications. Proven track record of optimizing database performance and leading cross-functional engineering teams. Expert in modern web technologies, React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Amazon Web Services cloud infrastructure.

bullets: Led a cross-functional team of 12 engineers and designers to build a new cloud-native microservices platform using Node.js and AWS, resulting in a 40% increase in development velocity.
Engineered a high-throughput streaming data pipeline using Apache Kafka that processed over 25 million events per day with a guaranteed 99.99% system uptime.
Optimized database query performance by 55% across millions of records using Redis caching layers and PostgreSQL indexing strategies.
Spearheaded the migration of legacy monolithic architectures to Kubernetes-orchestrated microservices, reducing infrastructure cloud costs by 30%.
Developed an interactive real-time web dashboard using React and TypeScript, which directly improved user engagement metrics by 35%.
Automated deployment processes by designing robust CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, successfully reducing release cycle times by 50%.
Collaborated with product management and design teams to deliver 15 major customer-facing features ahead of schedule, enhancing client satisfaction ratings by 20%.
Maintained and supported a critical payment processing gateway, reducing transaction error rates by 18% through comprehensive unit and integration testing.
Maintained client websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, resolving 95% of reported bug tickets within SLA timelines.
Supported the engineering team in migrating database schemas, ensuring 100% data integrity for 10k customer accounts.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

skills: Tools: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Git

projects.name: CloudAnalytics Portal
projects.description: Designed and built an open-source visual telemetry dashboard providing real-time infrastructure metrics. Implemented high-performance WebSockets to stream live server statistics, supporting over 12k monthly active users with latency below 50ms.

awards.title: Outstanding Engineering Achievement Award
awards.description: Awarded for lead contribution to microservices migration.

certifications.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
certifications.description: Professional level certification for designing distributed systems on AWS.

volunteer.description: Contributed as a volunteer software engineer to build civic open-source software tools for local communities, improving website accessibility for 5k+ citizens.
